name: Show Control
description: Send OSC, Art-Net and sACN/E1.31 DMX from the phone over the LAN (VJ / lighting) + cue engine with timed fades (GO/STOP/RELEASE), browser control panel (/panel), signal fabric (one 0..1 signal fans out to many DMX channels/OSC faders), Art-Net node discovery (ArtPoll), optical DMX auto-mapping (light-transport matrix, single or Hadamard-multiplexed), live telemetry (/obs: rates, thread health, state) and Wake-on-LAN with service verification
author: Cauce
